hc406d20dg74e7g4484ga5e0gf38af4c9423e: May he rest in Summeroak forever. I...
hf4e0d482g717bg40ffga549gccc0ca791581: ... I apologize. I must have some time to myself.
hddd8eaf5ge8b8g46dfgb22cg2b12e16dc1b5: I am glad the goblins are no longer a threat. But where... where is Halsin?
hf9890690gc70cg47e8g9632g05e3cc26798f: You've done it. You brought Halsin back.
h05970646g6621g4409g94f8gd0bdc52cfc5c: I... I wish it did not feel too late. This grove is corrupt, its shepherds drowned in blood.
h0ea4f158gd55dg4d73g9ba2g68458cf2809e: Forgive me. You triumphed over the goblins, and that cannot have been an easy task.
h4af5d1c5g2da9g480fg9c80ga6d069ba9c40: After cutting through a grove of druids, goblins were simple.
hbff54b05g7667g4fa8gb32dg1947050a89e0: They were people, not weeds. We all suffered under Kagha's wicked leadership.
h5b4acf5eg5344g4d4dg98efgedc72a16cfab: You have my deepest gratitude. I promised you a reward, did I not?
h55201dd2g35adg4234gba15g1f1e06d13ca6: If it makes you feel any better, I found proof Kagha was allied with shadow druids.
ha4a44d6bg19e5g494dg8d9cgd1ce84e8a072: That explains... a great deal, although I suppose her true allegiances no longer matter.
h3a5bb7aagde9cg4e48gb9f8ge3f70ada54fa: I'm glad Halsin made it here, but I wish I could have helped more.
h597a1ebag9769g4cfegafcbg13b2cea446f4: Seeing Halsin gives me the strength to endure everything else. You did the right thing.
ha2d419cdg7954g4834gbf4cgcab5a0f7e6e0: What will you do now? You're basically the only druid left.
hb7ec571cg56efg4da5ga25ag5043e2038b13: I cannot abandon this place. By Silvanus' grace, I will remain here to serve as Halsin sees fit.
hc6bb75ccg178dg4893ga418ge26c4d49d0e9: It wasn't. So where's my reward?
h9ee0fee1g5109g448cga657g88f211499d42: Nature is an endless cycle of death and rebirth. Silvanus' grace will return to us one day.
h98efa642g511eg4602g8533gdfe296962b29: You've done it. You brought Halsin back. Thank you.
h286a7a47gab41g4606g9c7bg745ca3a4a3bf: No, thanks is not enough. May Silvanus bless you for all your days.
ha769c97bg7234g4479g876fgc090da6a4939: I cannot imagine taking on a camp full of goblins was a simple task.
h4e7d49c1g1cf3g4bdfg9776gcca26ef9bf15: For someone like me? It was pretty simple, actually.
hc5f3aebag5371g4adcg9b15ge107ef7cba4c: Fair enough. I should not have underestimated you.
hbd06b0dcgdd4eg484bg9294g450fca815fe4: And I promised you a reward, didn't I?
h7dc71c70g8599g4f1bg9b05g6b63ee5caf46: Let me show you on your map where you can find the cache. Take this rune - you'll need it.
hbb48824cg8e94g44cag93e0ge8c6f7f2dee3: Place it among the pedestals inside our library. When the wolf glows brightest, everything in the vault below will be yours.
ha8cc4c94gbea6g4565g81b8g5fd817f7f208: Where is the rune? My apologies. It seems to have been... taken.
h2001c39bg0cedg46degbf40gfda4745972ad: Forgive me. I can only offer my gratitude, and pray Silvanus protects you on your journey.
hbfe8fafag5fa1g4b34g8e6cg3b4e445c8b6f: Think nothing of it. I'm glad Halsin is safe.
hf834aa40gd876g4c43ga7b1g2f380a5b647c: As am I. The grove will be whole again.
hb9c1fc64gc55bg4f4eg927fg69f1d90f693d: It was a hell full of blood and ash.
h4a48bc6cg44e6g4a98g9477gcc5f86849951: To be expected. I am glad you survived intact.
hf6e773a9g4177g4f14g8c82gfc5d29f8f30d: I'm just here for the reward.
hc3f28e3fgd262g4d72g816eg1c68314fd173: Thanks to you, the grove is whole again.
ha323ee46g3b0eg42c6g9b40g5663dd15b2bf: Halsin will guide us forward, and Kagha's heart will heal. I have full faith in that.
h03046410g71a3g4061ga9b3g99d00036dca9: With Halsin's return, you can feel the change in the air.
h66f1253ag5e7eg44aeg8634g249b537a0cfa: All the pain Kagha caused will heal with the season's turn, as it should be.
h2ae8e3a2gc3fag48edg8c53gfd31bf7bfcc8: Now that Halsin is here, Kagha will surely see sense.
hc245c21egf6a7g499bg8a4cgaef96a791c01: I hope whatever rot was lurking in her heart can be swiftly cut away.
ha0e096d7g8239g4728g895fg3d344cf93405: Kagha was allied with Shadow Druids. I have proof.
hcb05d11dgfb63g4169g8bddg62d48e4104e0: That... explains a great deal. To think that Kagha could fall to their corruption under Silvanus' gaze.
h9c926421g92a7g4ad6ga3ecg44a3200bfdd0: But I will leave that for Halsin to judge. He is First Druid, and I will not gainsay him as Kagha has done.
h855aeb9age156g4950ga8deg866bdd4800c6: By your efforts, Silvanus' grace can be restored to the grove. May he always share your stride.
